source_meta.source_document: Exeter and Trident II official product materials

systems.system_notes: Hybrid hip arthroplasty platform pairing the Exeter cemented femoral stem family with the Trident acetabular system.

trays.tray_notes: Exeter is described by Stryker as one implant and instrument system, while Trident II materials describe simplified trays that complement the new instruments.

components.component_notes: Official Exeter materials list the Exeter V40 femoral stem range with multiple offsets and lengths.
Official Trident II product materials describe the Trident II acetabular system and Tritanium/PureFix shell family.
Trident II materials explicitly reference X3 polyethylene as a supported bearing option.
Trident II materials explicitly reference the Modular Dual Mobility (MDM) liner option.

products.product_notes: Official Exeter product page lists product code 0580-1-300 for a 30mm offset 95mm Exeter V40 femoral stem.

unresolved_items.raw_text: Additional Exeter stem codes and Trident shell or liner catalogue rows exist in the source materials.
unresolved_items.reason: Deeper catalogue expansion is still needed before the full implant family is represented at SKU level.
unresolved_items.source_excerpt: Current extraction captures one explicit Exeter stem code and the core Trident component families only.
